text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time has passed since the announcement of
the URA Finale.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: The Finale Champion, huh? Now you're talkin'!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I wonder which race I should go for...
Medium-distance? Or maybe even the mile?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You'd better make it the mile... for your own
good.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm going for the medium-distance race, and I'm
always number one! ♪

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What?! Them's fightin' words!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That settles it! I'm goin' for medium too! Let's
settle this once and for all, Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph! Bring it on!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohohoho! The first champion of the URA
Finale... Truly, a title worthy of a first-rate racer
such as I, King Halo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Come, Sky! I shall grant you the honor of racing
with me! Join me for another round of partner
running!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah, I'm coming... Boy, you sure are good
at bossing people around.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Although... I guess this is my chance to check a
few things, so... whatever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Excitement is spreading among the Umamusume
as they prepare for the URA Finale.
choice_data_list: (I have to try my best too!)
(I have to try my best too!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I renew my resolve...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: VRRROOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Kyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I dash off in the direction of the noise to see
what's going on.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Who... Where... Why...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: What is this huge machine?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I arrive at the dirt track to find Tazuna in a
panic...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: VRRROOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...and what appears to be an enormous vehicle
producing an explosive noise.
choice_data_list: What the heck is going on?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Hahahaha! Crying out for joy, Tazuna? I
completely understand!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Oho?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Serendipity! Why, if it isn't
Trainer <username>!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Fortuitous! You're just the person I wanted to talk
to. With regards to—

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Now wait just a moment, Director!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Before you go any further, please explain this
enormous contraption!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Apologies! I've gotten ahead of myself.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Heh, heh, heh. Listen and be amazed!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Restoration! Dirt tracks just like new in an instant!
Adjustments! Fine-tune the amount of sand
needed to your exact specifications!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Behold! The pinnacle of racecourse maintenance
technology... the Ready-Paver Mk. III!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The pinnacle of racecourse maintenance
technology? Don't tell me you dipped into your
pocket money again!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Naturally! When it comes to providing a safe
training environment for our precious
Umamusume, I will spare no expense!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Any price I pay towards such a goal is trivial!
Trivial, I say!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That's a wonderful sentiment, but can't you ever
do things in moderation?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear... Where are we even going to put
something this enormous?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: VRRROOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry you had to see this, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Apologies! And may I say...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Greetings! It's been far too long,
Trainer <username>!
Why, I believe the last time we spoke was during
your training days!
choice_data_list: It's nice to see you again.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Oho? What's this? That gleam in your eyes... Now
that's a look I can get behind!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Vindication! I knew you were someone to keep an
eye on!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Vindication! I knew you were someone to keep an
eye on!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Director Akikawa has had her eye on you
for some time.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! Since the time my mother was director of
the academy, I have seen many trainers come
through these gates.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Thusly! By the way you carry yourself and how you
interact with your trainee, I can tell...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Conviction! As a trainer, you will become a firm
pillar to support your Umamusume's dreams!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I feel the same. Which is why we've wanted to
speak with you for some time...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! We would love for you and your trainee
to help us make the URA Finale a success!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, everything rests on the presence of
those who bear the hopes and dreams of their
fans on their shoulders...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
That is to say, if the race is to succeed, we must
have star Umamusume take part.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The best and only way to win fans is to
participate in races.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But if you can amass a great number of victories
and gather enough support...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Success! The path to becoming a star
Umamusume will open before you!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Encouragement! Keep pushing forward together
with your trainee!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
We're looking forward to seeing her sprint
towards becoming the first Finale Champion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa's passion renews my excitement
for the URA Finale.
